title: Grove Contract
description: Schema for the structured YAML frontmatter of a GROVE.md workflow contract. Supports contract_version 1 (legacy claim_policy), contract_version 2 (concurrency, execution, rate_limits, retry, topology, gossip, outcome_policy), and contract_version 3 (renames topology to agent_topology). The YAML frontmatter is validated against this schema; the Markdown body is free-form prose for human/agent-readable context.

contract_version.description: Contract schema version. Version 1 uses claim_policy; version 2 uses concurrency, execution, rate_limits, retry, topology, gossip, and outcome_policy; version 3 renames topology to agent_topology.

mode.description: Default contribution mode for this grove. Individual contributions may override.

seed.description: Reference to the seed contribution. May be a CID, a descriptive ref, or a URL.

metrics.description: Named metric definitions. Keys are metric names (lowercase, underscores), values define direction and optional gate thresholds.

gates.description: Contribution gates — declarative rules that must pass before a contribution is accepted to the frontier. Non-gated contributions are still stored in the DAG but flagged.

metric_definition.description: Definition of a named metric with scoring direction and optional gate threshold.

direction.description: Whether lower or higher values are better for this metric.

gate.description: Threshold for frontier inclusion. For 'minimize' metrics, contributions must score at or below this value. For 'maximize' metrics, contributions must score at or above it.
A declarative contribution gate rule. The 'type' field determines which other fields are required.

metric.description: Metric name. Required for metric_improves and min_score gates. Must reference a metric defined in the metrics section.

name.description: Artifact name pattern. Required for has_artifact gates.

relation_type.description: Relation type. Required for has_relation gates.

count.description: Minimum count. Required for min_reviews gates.

threshold.description: Minimum score threshold. For min_reviews gates, this is a review score (0-1 by convention). For min_score gates, this is a raw metric value in the metric's native units.

stop_conditions.description: Conditions under which the grove should stop accepting new contributions. Multiple conditions may be specified; the grove stops when ANY condition is met.

max_rounds_without_improvement.description: Auto-stop after N rounds with no frontier advance.

target_metric.description: Stop when a metric reaches a target value. For 'minimize' metrics, stops when score is at or below the value. For 'maximize' metrics, stops when score is at or above.

metric.description: The metric name. Should reference a metric defined in the metrics section.

budget.description: Maximum budget before stopping. Specify one or both sub-fields.

quorum_review_score.description: Stop when a contribution achieves review consensus.

deliberation_limit.description: Maximum discussion rounds or messages per topic.

agent_constraints.description: Rules constraining agent behavior within this grove.

allowed_kinds.description: Contribution kinds agents are allowed to submit. If omitted, all kinds are allowed.

required_artifacts.description: Required artifact name patterns per contribution kind. Keys are contribution kinds, values are arrays of artifact name patterns that must be present.

required_relations.description: Required relation types per contribution kind. Keys are contribution kinds, values are arrays of relation types that must be present.

artifact_requirements.description: List of artifact name patterns that must be present in a contribution of this kind.

relation_requirements.description: List of relation types that must be present in a contribution of this kind.

claim_policy.description: Policy for claim coordination (v1 only). Use concurrency/execution/rate_limits/retry for v2+.

default_lease_seconds.description: Default lease duration in seconds. Protocol default is 300 (5 minutes). Minimum 30 seconds, maximum 86400 (24 hours).

max_claims_per_agent.description: Maximum concurrent claims per agent. 0 means unlimited.

heartbeat_required.description: Whether heartbeats are required to keep claims alive. Default: true.

max_active_claims.description: Maximum number of active claims across all agents.

max_claims_per_agent.description: Maximum concurrent claims per agent. 0 means unlimited.

max_claims_per_target.description: Maximum concurrent claims per target_ref. Protocol enforces at most 1.

stall_timeout_seconds.description: Time without heartbeat before a claim is considered stalled.

max_contributions_per_agent_per_hour.description: Maximum contributions per agent per sliding 1-hour window.

max_contributions_per_grove_per_hour.description: Maximum contributions per grove per sliding 1-hour window.

max_artifact_size_bytes.description: Maximum size of a single artifact in bytes.

max_artifacts_per_contribution.description: Maximum number of artifacts per contribution.

base_delay_ms.description: Base delay in milliseconds for exponential backoff.

gossip.description: Gossip protocol configuration (v2/v3). Controls peer-to-peer dissemination of contributions.

fan_out.description: Number of peers to gossip with per round.

partial_view_size.description: Maximum number of peers in the partial view.

shuffle_length.description: Number of entries exchanged per shuffle round.

suspicion_timeout_seconds.description: Time before a non-responsive peer is suspected.

failure_timeout_seconds.description: Time before a suspected peer is declared failed.

digest_limit.description: Maximum number of digests per gossip message.

outcome_policy.description: Outcome policy for automatic accept/reject of contributions (v2/v3).

auto_accept.description: Conditions under which contributions are automatically accepted.

metric_improves.description: Auto-accept when this metric improves over the frontier.

auto_reject.description: Conditions under which contributions are automatically rejected.

metric_regresses.description: Auto-reject when this metric regresses from the frontier.

missing_required_artifacts.description: Auto-reject when required artifacts are missing.

require_manual_review.description: Whether contributions require manual review before acceptance.

agent_topology.description: Agent topology defining structure, roles, edges, and spawning rules for multi-agent coordination. Used as 'topology' in v2 contracts and 'agent_topology' in v3 contracts.

structure.description: Topology structure type. 'graph' allows arbitrary edges, 'tree' enforces single-parent hierarchy, 'flat' disallows edges.

roles.description: Agent roles within the topology. Each role defines a named participant type with optional edges to other roles.

edge_types.description: Custom edge type names allowed in this topology.

topology_role.description: An agent role within a topology, with optional description, instance limits, and edges to other roles.

name.description: Role name. Must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores.

max_instances.description: Maximum number of concurrent instances of this role.

edges.description: Directed edges from this role to other roles.

role_edge.description: A directed edge from one role to another.

edge_type.description: Type of relationship between the roles.

spawning_config.description: Configuration for dynamic agent spawning within the topology.

dynamic.description: Whether dynamic spawning of new agent instances is allowed.

max_depth.description: Maximum nesting depth for spawned agents.

max_children_per_agent.description: Maximum number of child agents a single agent can spawn.

timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds for spawned agent sessions.
